Hero.description: Autodidacte depuis 2019, spécialisé Flutter mobile et Next.js web. Apps publiées sur Play Store & App Store. Du code à la production.

Experience.subtitle: My journey through different roles and companies.

item0.description: Development and maintenance of Flutter mobile applications. Autonomous management of a complex client project — Flutter mobile architecture + C# backend integration. Delivered projects: Application & Miabé Hackathon Website.

item1.description: Taking over and finalizing an existing codebase until publication on App Store & Play Store. Complete redesign of an application after UX analysis — delivered in one week. 2 apps published on stores.

item2.description: State project for digitizing land titles of the national land registry in Lome. Quality control and analysis of entered data.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent work in mobile and web development.

item0.title: Cherish
item0.description: Personalized greeting cards application for all occasions...
item0.fullDescription: Personalized greeting cards application for all occasions. Users can add events and receive reminder notifications before each important event (birthdays, holidays, etc.). Business model based on a €0.99 micro-payment per high-resolution card download.

item1.title: S Contact
item1.description: Instant contact sharing via QR code...
item1.fullDescription: Instant and contactless contact sharing. The application allows you to enter your own information, generate a QR code, and when scanned by a third party, directly and automatically save it to the phone's address book.

item2.title: Woez
item2.description: Complete rental ecosystem — Flutter mobile app, management site for real estate agents and car rentals, billing site, backend documentation.
item2.fullDescription: Complete rental ecosystem — Flutter mobile app, management site for real estate agents and car rentals, billing site, backend documentation. Stack: Flutter, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase.

item3.title: EcoMap
item3.description: Collaborative mapping of dumpsites in Heat Map...
item3.fullDescription: A citizen ecological initiative for mapping wild dumpsites as a Heat Map. The application allows the population to easily report polluted areas via geolocation to assist local environmental organizations in waste management.

item4.title: I Fashion Wear
item4.description: Showcase site and management tool for an eyewear shop.
item4.fullDescription: Design of a modern and high-performance showcase site and management dashboard for an online sunglasses and eyewear shop, including inventory, product catalog, order management, and customer support.

item5.title: Make 10!
item5.description: Mathematical puzzle mobile game developed with Unity...
item5.fullDescription: A mathematical puzzle game developed solo in the Unity engine from scratch. The goal is to combine number blocks to reach the sum of 10. Includes over 300 levels with progressive difficulty. Successfully published on the Google Play Store.
